title: Microsoft security advisory (AV26-473)
description: On May 14, 2026, Microsoft published a security advisory to address a critical vulnerability in the following products:
products: Microsoft Exchange Server 2016 on premises versions (any update level)
Microsoft Exchange Server 2019 on premises versions (any update level)
Exchange Server Subscription Edition (SE) on premises versions (any update level)
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
